data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an emergency override, which allows a manager to force assignment. However, there is no evidence provided that demonstrates the existence or functionality of this feature within the system. The linked use case mentions the need for an emergency override, but without concrete evidence of its implementation or operation, this requirement remains unfulfilled.
gaps: No evidence of the emergency override functionality being implemented or tested.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for emergency override functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the manager can force assignment through the emergency override feature.
